title: Oogcentrum Baron Joostensstraat
description: This clinic started with no IT setup, so I handled the project from planning to delivery. I installed and configured two clinic PCs, built the website, and set up an internal app for patient flow and staff updates. I chose a compact Synology NAS to keep data on-site and make daily maintenance simple. On location, I assembled the hardware, installed Windows 11, and configured Synology DSM with shared storage and backups. The website supports online appointments, doctor selection, email confirmations, reminders, and cancellations. The admin area includes calendar scheduling, patient notes, user management, and real-time status updates during check-in and treatment.
